World's Smallest AI PC: Tiny AI Pocket Lab (100B Models Local)

Discover the Tiny AI Pocket Lab, the world's smallest mini PC capable of running 100 billion parameter models locally and offline. This Guinness World Record holder offers military-grade encryption and a private "second brain" for your business data without any monthly subscription fees.
